title: Marketplace Manager - Country Delight - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Country Delight - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Country Delight! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
